# Tech Blog

This project is a modern, responsive Tech Blog application.

**Important Note:** This project was entirely created and generated by **Google AI Studio**, not by me. I only provided prompts describing what I wanted, but Google AI Studio is the creator and developer of the application.

## Hosting Requirements
This project was designed so that it can be hosted as a static site or modern deployment platform using Vercel, Netlify, or GitHub Pages.

## Admin Access
To access the administrative section, use the login gateway.
Password: `system administrative dashboard dinesh`

## Features
- Minimalist, high-performance UI
- Integrated Markdown Editor
- Client-side persistence
- Search and Filtering by topics and tags
- Seamless Mobile/Desktop navigation

## Scripts
- `npm run dev`: Start local development environment
- `npm run build`: Compile and build the project for production
- `npm start`: Start the production server (if applicable)

## Technologies Used
- React
- Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- framer-motion (motion/react)
- Lucide React for iconography
